creator: dan@langille.org
text:
On 31 Aug 2006 at 18:30, Ion-Mihai Tetcu wrote:

> Synopsis: [MAINTAINER-UPDATE] sysutils/bacula-server-devel upgrade to 1.39.20-20060822
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: itetcu
> State-Changed-When: Thu Aug 31 18:30:55 UTC 2006
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Bad plist:
> http://sce-tindy.tecnik93.com/tb-exp/index.php?action=describe_port&id=770;
> I added the file in pkg-plist but it is still left behind, I don't
> understand why.
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=102450

Well found.  Solution is simple.  This patch should be applied after 
the latest patch in the PR.

# diff -ub pkg-plist~ pkg-plist
--- pkg-plist~  Thu Aug 31 20:46:31 2006
+++ pkg-plist   Thu Aug 31 20:46:31 2006
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
 sbin/bscan
 sbin/bsmtp
 sbin/btape
+sbin/btraceback
 sbin/bwild
 sbin/chio-bacula
 sbin/dbcheck


-- 
Dan Langille : Software Developer looking for work
my resume: http://www.freebsddiary.org/dan_langille.php
